data.name: Home.Title
data.value: Turn scattered chats into a daily brief that feels usable on day one.

data.name: Home.Lede
data.value: This bootstrap keeps the real architecture intact: invite-only auth, hidden Matrix identities, Telegram bridge integration, extraction, digest, and a focused pilot surface.

data.name: Home.InviteOnlyHint
data.value: Invite-only bootstrap. In development the app reveals the generated link directly after submission.

data.name: Home.Metric.Milestone.Value
data.value: Login -> connect Telegram -> first Today card

data.name: Home.Metric.Modules.Value
data.value: Auth, Matrix provisioning, Telegram connect, sync, extraction, digest, search

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Description
data.value: Your hidden Matrix identity is provisioned automatically. The app opens a private management room with the bridge, waits for the login prompt, and then starts syncing real Telegram messages.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.BridgePendingNotice
data.value: The bridge is preparing the login prompt. Refresh this page in a few seconds to pick up the web login link.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.DevModeHint
data.value: In development mode the app still seeds sample messages so the product surface remains inspectable without a live Telegram account.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.SuccessConnected
data.value: The account is confirmed. SuperChat will now keep pulling new work signals from Telegram.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Error.StartFailed
data.value: The bridge could not start the Telegram login flow. Please try again in a few seconds.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Error.RequiresSetup
data.value: A Matrix profile still needs to be provisioned for this user before the bridge can finish the login.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Error.ConfirmationFailed
data.value: The bridge did not confirm the login. Restart the connection flow and try the steps again.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Validation.PhoneRequired
data.value: Enter a phone number to continue the login.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Validation.PhoneInvalid
data.value: The phone number looks incomplete. Use a format like +7 999 123-45-67.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Validation.CodeRequired
data.value: Enter the confirmation code from Telegram.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Validation.CodeInvalid
data.value: The code looks too short. Please check it and try again.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Progress.Started
data.value: Starting the secure bridge login and waiting for the next step.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Progress.PhoneStepStarted
data.value: The login form is ready. Send the phone number so the bridge can request the confirmation code.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Progress.CodeSubmitted
data.value: The code has been sent. Checking whether Telegram confirms the login.

data.name: ConnectTelegram.Progress.PasswordSubmitted
data.value: The password has been sent. Finishing the login confirmation and refreshing the status automatically.

data.name: Today.Empty
data.value: No cards yet. Connect Telegram and let the sync/extraction cycle seed the first digest.

data.name: Search.Title
data.value: Search extracted work, not raw chat dumps

data.name: Feedback.Description
data.value: Use this during the pilot to mark whether the digest and search are actually useful.

data.name: Feedback.Recorded
data.value: Feedback recorded. Thanks for tightening the pilot loop.

data.name: Auth.RequestLink.Description
data.value: Only invited pilot emails can enter the bootstrap.

data.name: Auth.Code.Sent
data.value: Verification code sent to your email.

data.name: Auth.Code.NotInvited
data.value: This email is not invited to the pilot yet.

data.name: Auth.Code.TooManyRequests
data.value: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes.

data.name: Auth.Code.DeliveryFailed
data.value: Could not send the code. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.Code.GenericError
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.Verify.EnterCode
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.

data.name: Auth.Verify.InvalidOrExpired
data.value: Verification code is invalid or expired.

data.name: Auth.Verify.TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.

data.name: Privacy.Point1
data.value: Access is limited to invited pilot users.

data.name: Privacy.Point2
data.value: The bootstrap keeps Matrix and Telegram integration behind the product UI.

data.name: Privacy.Point3
data.value: Extracted items are intended for Today, Waiting, Search, and pilot feedback loops only.

data.name: Privacy.Point4
data.value: Public launch should stay blocked until Telegram terms are reviewed separately.

data.name: Error.Subtitle
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Error.DevelopmentModeDescription
data.value: Running in Development shows the detailed error behind this request.

data.name: Error.DevelopmentModeWarning
data.value: Do not enable Development on deployed environments, because it can expose sensitive exception details to end users.

data.name: Chat.Auth.Title
data.value: Ask short questions about your conversations

data.name: Chat.Auth.Description
data.value: Sign in with a magic link, then work from one compact chat window.

data.name: Chat.Greeting
data.value: Pick a question template and send it to the chat.

data.name: Chat.Greeting.NoConnection
data.value: Chat becomes available after Telegram is connected.

data.name: Chat.Template.Today.Description
data.value: Show only what actually needs attention today.

data.name: Chat.Template.Waiting.Description
data.value: Collect promises and places where a reply is still pending.

data.name: Chat.Template.Waiting.Question
data.value: Where am I waiting for a reply?

data.name: Chat.Template.Recent.Description
data.value: Show fresh messages only for the current day.

data.name: Chat.Template.Meetings.Description
data.value: Show the nearest meetings and time-based plans.

data.name: Chat.Template.Meetings.Question
data.value: What upcoming meetings do I have?

data.name: Chat.Template.Custom.Description
data.value: Ask in your own words. Up to 100 characters.

data.name: Chat.Input.CustomPlaceholder
data.value: For example: what is happening with Valeria and the contract?

data.name: Chat.Answer.Today.Intro
data.value: Here is what currently looks important for today.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Today.Empty
data.value: Nothing stands out for today yet.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Waiting.Intro
data.value: Here is where a reply still seems to be pending.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Waiting.Empty
data.value: There are no obvious waiting-on items right now.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Recent.Intro
data.value: Here are messages only from the current day.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Recent.Empty
data.value: There are no messages for the current day yet.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Meetings.Intro
data.value: Here are the nearest meetings I could identify.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Meetings.Empty
data.value: No upcoming meetings stand out yet.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Custom.Intro
data.value: Here is what I could find for your question.

data.name: Chat.Answer.Custom.Empty
data.value: I could not find anything for that question yet.

data.name: Chat.Error.Generic
data.value: I could not get an answer. Please try again.

data.name: Landing.Title
data.value: Stop losing important work in Telegram

data.name: Landing.Lead
data.value: SuperChat turns noisy work conversations into a clear action layer: what matters today, who is waiting for your reply, what you promised, and where exactly it was discussed.

data.name: Landing.Point.Today.Copy
data.value: See immediately where the next step is needed.

data.name: Landing.Point.Waiting.Copy
data.value: Follow-ups do not disappear inside the message stream.

data.name: Landing.Point.Commitment.Copy
data.value: The system pulls commitments and agreements back to the surface.

data.name: Landing.Point.Search.Copy
data.value: Every surfaced insight stays grounded in a specific chat and context.

data.name: Landing.Login.Copy
data.value: Request a magic link and open SuperChat without extra steps. Access is currently limited to pilot accounts.

data.name: Landing.InviteOnly
data.value: The product sits on top of Telegram and does not replace it. The goal is clarity, trust, and explainable context.

data.name: Today.Meetings.Intro
data.value: This page keeps only the nearest upcoming meetings from your work chats.

data.name: Today.Connection.Copy
data.value: After connection, SuperChat will start showing meetings and agreements from your work chats.

data.name: Landing.Point.Meetings.Copy
data.value: See only what is getting close and should not get lost.

data.name: Landing.Point.AutoRefresh.Copy
data.value: The meeting feed is assembled from work chats without maintaining a calendar by hand.

data.name: Landing.Point.Context.Copy
data.value: Each meeting keeps a link back to the source chat and wording.

data.name: Landing.Point.Focus.Copy
data.value: Focus stays on the near future, without old work buckets.

data.name: Search.Chat.Intro
data.value: Check the nearest meetings and see which chat captured the agreement.

data.name: Search.Connection.Copy
data.value: After connection, SuperChat will start surfacing meetings and agreements straight from work chats.

data.name: Chat.Ui.AnswerPlaceholder
data.value: Pick a template and send the request. The answer will appear here with supporting cards.

data.name: Chat.Ui.AnswerFallback
data.value: The signals below are the closest explainable context for the selected question.

data.name: Chat.Ui.EvidenceEmpty
data.value: After the answer, cards with the chat, message fragment, and time will appear here.

data.name: Chat.Ui.ContextTitle
data.value: Open a card on the right

data.name: Chat.Ui.ContextBody
data.value: Every answer is tied to a specific chat, message fragment, and time.
